thesis: Improve first-week setup and content discovery to lift early engagement and downstream retention.
Personalized rows and recommendations to deepen engagement across the household lifecycle.
Drive owned free-channel viewing, which carries high-margin ad inventory and correlates with retention.
Better placement, bundling, and offers to convert engaged households to subscriptions.
Targeted campaigns to recover lapsing households, modeled as a retention-curve lift.
Localize onboarding and monetization in international markets where retention and CPMs lag the US.
Automate cohort/CLV reporting so the team spends time on analysis and decisions, not data pulls. (No direct driver lift — value is indirect, so it classifies as an enabler.)
